Enjoy moments of pure fun on the Crazy Sofa - Inflatable Towable with Desportos Náuticos de Alvor. A dynamic and energetic activity, perfect for those looking for laughter, excitement and shared experiences at sea.

Towed by a speedboat, the inflatable sofa glides over the waves delivering a fun and accessible experience, ideal for groups of friends, families and participants of different ages. The activity is always adapted to the sea conditions, ensuring enjoyment with total safety.

With a short but intense duration, the Crazy Sofa - Inflatable Towable is the perfect choice for anyone who wants to experience the best of the sea in Alvor in a relaxed, lively and unforgettable way.

The Banana Slider Inflatable Towable is one of the most entertaining and accessible watersports experiences on the Algarve coast, perfect for those who want to combine fun, laughter and the thrill of being out at sea. Riding on an inflatable banana shaped slider, participants are pulled by a speedboat while bouncing over the waves, creating a shared experience full of excitement and unforgettable moments.

This activity is ideal for families, groups of friends and mixed age groups, as it does not require previous experience or special skills. Safety is always a priority, with life jackets provided and the ride adapted to the sea conditions on the day. The balance between fun and safety makes the Banana Slider in Alvor a great choice for both children and adults.

One of the main advantages of the Banana Slider is its social aspect. With space for several participants at once, everyone shares the same ride, laughs and splashes, making it a popular option for group activities, holidays and special occasions. The short duration delivers an intense and enjoyable experience without being too demanding, ideal for first time watersports participants.

Located in Alvor, this watersport also offers a unique perspective of the coastline, combining beautiful sea views with pure fun. Whether you want to add excitement to your beach day or create lasting holiday memories, the Banana Slider in Alvor is a must try activity that delivers smiles, adrenaline and shared joy on the water.
⚠️ Quantity corresponds to the number of attendees.
